title: hieracium armerioides subsp. phalacrophyllum
intro: Hieracium armerioides subsp. phalacrophyllum, also known as the Phalacrophyllum Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium armerioides subsp. phalacrophyllum include its potential to treat various conditions such as eczema, acne, and other skin irritations, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area or consumed internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
